title: Ls03F 65 Inch Art Store Black Qa65Ls03Fausmm
features: Your Art Gallery On TV
Key features at a glance
Design
Designed to look like a slim picture frame
Elegantly minimal and modern, The Frame's design is a work of art in itself that blends beautifully into your home.
Tailor to your space with customizable bezels

Style The Frame to your taste with customizable bezel frames. Find the color that best complements your space or the artwork on display among the available options. Then install with ease by snapping the sleek magnetic bezel onto the sides of your TV.2
Find the right height for your space
The Frame can easily be made to fit your home setup. With the adjustable TV stand design, you can set the TV to your preferred height and make room for a soundbar and other devices.3
Art
TV when it's on. Art when it's off.

When turned off, The Frame transforms into a showcase of art instead of a black screen. Find the right piece to display from the Samsung Art Store’s wide selection of artwork from renowned galleries, including 370+ free pieces available each year.4
Frame your most-loved moments

You can easily upload and exhibit your own photos or a new family portrait from Google Photos in your home on your TV and Smart Display. Simply send your photos to The Frame via SmartThings for easy display.

You can easily upload and exhibit your own photos or a new family portrait. Simply send your photos on your phone or cloud storage apps like iCloud Photos to The Frame via SmartThings for easy display.
Picture Quality
Stunning visuals for art and entertainment alike

Watch TV with exceptional QLED picture quality. Using Samsung's sophisticated display technology, The Frame produces a vibrant image with a wide range of colors and high brightness levels, so you can appreciate what's on your screen.
Samsung Vision AI
Samsung Vision AI meets The Frame

Enjoy new features with Samsung's Vision AI, now in The Frame. This next-level intelligence allows your TV to better recognize and adjust to your needs, delivering a variety of new opportunities for entertainment.
Enjoy 7 years ofnew TV experiencesfor free16
